programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's son Hunter has run out of time to restock the store, so he puts six returned items in each chef's cart; the chefs must use all six ingredients over the course of both rounds, starting with a hometown favorite dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes back former GGG winners who use their meatless dishes to show the meat eaters how it's done; they make a dish without any carts before shopping each aisle to make a 10-item winner's dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Returning chefs call out their market rivals for a $10,000 showdown to settle the score; a Seoul food chef challenges the opponent who beat her by one point, and a five-time GGG winner calls out the judge who defeated her in a cheesy battle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes four previous winners back to Flavortown Market for a nonstop super battle; he gives them each $100 to make a complete steakhouse feast in 60 minutes, but first, they have to participate in a dreaded Flavortown whammy auction.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri surprises three of his all-star friends by turning a savory showdown into a dessert battle; they'll have to transform diner classics into sweet treats before making a fried dessert using mystery ingredients from Crazy Can Roulette.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Four competition-winning chefs battle it out for the title of Flavortown Food Network Champ and a $15,000 prize; they compete in a pair of sudden-death matches and make a seafood dinner using the food pyramid.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes three up-and-coming food stars with big social media followings to take part in a viral-worthy culinary competition. The competitors must prepare their signature dish using only the ingredients they can fit in a tiny shopping bag.
